# default

**Type Property**

The default [doc://com.apple.scenekit/documentation/SceneKit/SCNPhysicsBody/categoryBitMask] value for dynamic and kinematic bodies.

## Declaration

```swift
static var `default`: SCNPhysicsCollisionCategory { get }
```

## Constants

- **static**: The default [doc://com.apple.scenekit/documentation/SceneKit/SCNPhysicsBody/categoryBitMask] value for static bodies.
- **all**: This is the default value for a physics body’s [doc://com.apple.scenekit/documentation/SceneKit/SCNPhysicsBody/collisionBitMask] property.
